body:
Hi Anthony,

Your quarterly CPAP resupply order has been confirmed. We're shipping 2 disposable filters, 1 mask cushion, and 1 full face mask frame for your ResMed AirSense 11. Tracking will follow once it leaves our warehouse.

Thanks for being a Restwell customer.

Restwell Medical Supply
snippet: Hi Anthony,\n\nYour quarterly CPAP resupply order has been confirmed. We're shi
subject: Your CPAP resupply order is confirmed

body:
Hey Anthony,

Travis here. Saw your quarterly resupply go through. Insurance covered everything this cycle so no out-of-pocket. If the new full face mask gives you any trouble with the seal, call me direct and I'll get you a different size sent out.

Drive safe,
Travis Lemons
Restwell Medical Supply
snippet: Hey Anthony,\n\nTravis here. Saw your quarterly resupply go through. Insurance c
subject: Re: Your CPAP resupply order is confirmed

body:
Hi Travis,

Appreciate you keeping an eye on it. The last full mask sealed fine so the same size should be good. Ship it to the apartment as usual, I'll be back in Birmingham next week and can grab it off the porch.

Thanks,
Anthony
snippet: Hi Travis,\n\nAppreciate you keeping an eye on it. The last full mask sealed fin
subject: Re: Your CPAP resupply order is confirmed

body:
Mr. Hicks,

This is a reminder that you have a sleep follow-up appointment with Dr. Lisa Cho on Thursday, October 29, 2026 at 2:30 PM. Please bring your CPAP machine so we can download your compliance data. Reply or call us at (205) 555-0234 if you need to reschedule.

Birmingham Sleep and Pulmonary
snippet: Mr. Hicks,\n\nThis is a reminder that you have a sleep follow-up appointmen
subject: Reminder: Sleep follow-up with Dr. Cho on Oct 29

body: Thanks for the reminder. October 29 at 2:30 works for me. I'll make sure I'm off the road that week and I'll bring the AirSense with me.\n\nAnthony Hicks
snippet: Thanks for the reminder. October 29 at 2:30 works for me. I'll make su
subject: Re: Reminder: Sleep follow-up with Dr. Cho on Oct 29

body:
Mr. Hicks,

Your recent bloodwork results are now available in the patient portal. Dr. Stubbs reviewed them and your cholesterol is slightly elevated but your A1C looks good. He'd like to recheck your blood pressure at a follow-up in about 8 weeks. Please call the front desk to schedule.

Irondale Family Practice
snippet: Mr. Hicks,\n\nYour recent bloodwork results are now available in the patient po
subject: Lab results available and BP follow-up needed

body: Thanks for letting me know. I'll log into the portal tonight and call to set up the blood pressure recheck. With my schedule it'll probably need to be a morning before I head out.\n\nAnthony
snippet: Thanks for letting me know. I'll log into the portal tonight and call to set up
subject: Re: Lab results available and BP follow-up needed

body: Anthony, got a load for you. Pickup Birmingham Mon AM, dropping in Atlanta Tue by noon. Then a backhaul out of Atlanta to Nashville Wed. Pays good. You good to take it? Lmk.\n\n- Mike
snippet: Anthony, got a load for you. Pickup Birmingham Mon AM, dropping in Atlanta Tue
subject: Load assignment: Birmingham to Atlanta Mon

body: I'm good for it, Mike. Send me the BOL and the dock numbers when you got em. I'll fuel up Sunday night so I can roll early Monday.\n\nAnthony
snippet: I'm good for it, Mike. Send me the BOL and the dock numbers when you got em. I
subject: Re: Load assignment: Birmingham to Atlanta Mon

body: Perfect. Paperwork is in the app. One change. Nashville receiver wants the Wed delivery before 4pm now, not end of day. Should still be plenty of time. Drive safe out there.\n\n- Mike
snippet: Perfect. Paperwork is in the app. One change. Nashville receiver wants the Wed
subject: Re: Load assignment: Birmingham to Atlanta Mon

body:
Hi Anthony,

Your pay stub for the period ending December 12, 2025 is now available. Net deposit of $2,418.76 will post to your account on December 17. Log in to view your full earnings statement.

Ridgeline Freight Solutions Payroll
snippet: Hi Anthony,\n\nYour pay stub for the period ending December 12, 2025 is now avail
subject: Your pay stub is ready, period ending 12/12

body:
Hi Anthony,

Open enrollment for 2026 benefits begins November 16 and closes November 30. Please review your medical, dental, and vision elections. No action is required if you wish to keep your current plans. Questions? Reply to this email and HR will assist.

Ridgeline Freight Solutions Human Resources
snippet: Hi Anthony,\n\nOpen enrollment for 2026 benefits begins November 16 and closes
subject: Action needed: Benefits open enrollment Nov 16-30

body:
Hey Daddy,

Miss you! Are you going to be near Nashville anytime this month? Would love to grab dinner if your route comes through. Also, you headed home for Christmas right? Mama Jean is already counting the days.

Love you,
Janelle
snippet: Hey Daddy,\n\nMiss you! Are you going to be near Nashville anytime this month? W
subject: Dinner when you come through Nashville?

body:
Hey sweetheart,

I've got a run that drops in Memphis next week and I might be able to swing through Nashville on the way back. I'll know more once Mike finalizes the schedule. Let's plan on dinner Thursday if it works out. How's the new job treating you?

Love,
Dad
snippet: Hey sweetheart,\n\nI've got a run that drops in Memphis next week and I might be
subject: Re: Dinner when you come through Nashville?

body: Thursday is perfect! Job's good, busy but good. I'll send you some photos from the office party, you'll laugh at my coworkers. Text me when you cross into TN and I'll pick the place. Drive safe, ok?\n\nJanelle
snippet: Thursday is perfect! Job's good, busy but good. I'll send you some photos from
subject: Re: Dinner when you come through Nashville?

body:
Dale,

I'm going to be on the road most of next week and Mama Jean's pantry is getting low. Can you or Tammy run by Tuscaloosa and check on her? I set up a grocery delivery to her place for Tuesday but somebody needs to be there to bring it in, you know she won't lift the heavy stuff. I'll pay you back for whatever.

Thanks brother,
Anthony
snippet: Dale,\n\nI'm going to be on the road most of next week and Mama Jean's pantry is
subject: Checking on Mama Jean next week

body: No problem at all, we got her. Tammy already planned to take her to the doctor Wednesday anyway so we'll handle the groceries Tuesday. Don't worry about paying us back. The handyman finally fixed her porch step too, looks good now.\n\nDale
snippet: No problem at all, we got her. Tammy already planned to take her to the doctor
subject: Re: Checking on Mama Jean next week

body:
Hey man,

Heads up if you're running I-20 west this week, they got construction crews down to one lane around the MS state line and it's a mess in the afternoons. I sat in it two hours yesterday. Take 78 if you can. You still parking at the Petro in Tuscaloosa or you found somewhere better?

- Ray
snippet: Hey man,\n\nHeads up if you're running I-20 west this week, they got construction
subject: Watch out for I-20 construction

body: Good lookin out, Ray. I'll take 78. Still at the Petro, can't beat the showers there. We should try to line up our schedules and grab a bite if we're ever parked the same night. Stay safe.\n\nAnthony
snippet: Good lookin out, Ray. I'll take 78. Still at the Petro, can't beat the showers
subject: Re: Watch out for I-20 construction

body:

The Audible Team
